Issue & Issue Type: Login screen has no loading indicator after button tap [UI]
Solution: Add a spinner/loading animation on the login button after it is tapped to give visual feedback to the user.

Issue & Issue Type: Back gesture on iOS dismisses unsaved form data without warning [UX]
Solution: Intercept the back gesture and show a confirmation dialog: "You have unsaved changes. Discard?"

Issue & Issue Type: Session timeout gives no warning before logging the user out [UX]
Solution: Show a countdown modal 2 minutes before session expiry with options to "Stay Logged In" or "Logout".

Issue & Issue Type: Breadcrumb navigation is missing on inner pages [UX]
Solution: Add a breadcrumb trail at the top of all second and third-level pages for easy navigation.

Issue & Issue Type: No keyboard shortcut support for power users [UX]
Solution: Introduce keyboard shortcuts (e.g. N = New Record; / = Search; Esc = Close modal) with a shortcut help panel.

Issue & Issue Type: Font size on dashboard cards is too small to read comfortably [UX]
Solution: Increase font size from 11px to 14px on dashboard cards; follow WCAG AA contrast guidelines.

Issue & Issue Type: Primary action buttons are not visually consistent across pages [UI]
Solution: Standardize button styles (color #4F46E5 — primary; border radius 8px; padding 12px 24px) across all pages.

Issue & Issue Type: Auto-save is not implemented on long forms — data lost on accidental refresh [UX]
Solution: Implement auto-save using localStorage every 30 seconds with a subtle "Draft saved" toast notification.

Issue & Issue Type: No visual distinction between active and expired entitlements in the list [UI]
Solution: Use color-coded badges — green for Active and red/grey for Expired — with an icon indicator.

Issue & Issue Type: Users cannot filter entitlements by type or status [UX]
Solution: Add a filter panel at the top of the entitlements list with dropdowns for Type and Status.

Issue & Issue Type: Assigning an entitlement has no confirmation step — easy to assign by mistake [UX]
Solution: Add a confirmation modal before finalizing entitlement assignment with summary of selected options.

Issue & Issue Type: Bulk selection of entitlements is not available [UX]
Solution: Add checkboxes on each row and a "Select All" option with batch action toolbar (assign / revoke / export).

Issue & Issue Type: Entitlement detail page has no audit log or history of changes [UX]
Solution: Add a "History" tab on the entitlement detail page showing timestamped change log with actor info.

Issue & Issue Type: Column headers are not sortable — users cannot reorder data [UX]
Solution: Make all column headers clickable with ascending/descending sort indicators (arrow icons).

Issue & Issue Type: No empty state message when a table has no data [UI]
Solution: Display a friendly empty-state illustration with a message like "No records found" and a CTA button.

Issue & Issue Type: Long text in table cells gets truncated with no tooltip to view full content [UI]
Solution: Add a hover tooltip that shows the full cell content when text is truncated with ellipsis.

Issue & Issue Type: Pagination controls are at the bottom only — hard to reach on long tables [UX]
Solution: Add pagination controls both at the top and bottom of the table for quicker navigation.

Issue & Issue Type: No export option available for table data [UX]
Solution: Add an Export button (CSV / Excel / PDF) in the table toolbar.

Issue & Issue Type: No column visibility toggle — users are forced to see all columns [UX]
Solution: Add a "Columns" button in the toolbar that opens a popover to show/hide individual columns.

Issue & Issue Type: No dark mode support — strains eyes in low-light environments [UI]
Solution: Implement a system-preference-aware dark mode using CSS media query (prefers-color-scheme).
